hooks.prompt: Check if this session involved creating or editing plan files (in docs/plans/ or any subdirectory) or plan detail files (in docs/plan-details/). If no plan work was done, approve the stop. If plan work was done, verify: (1) Every plan has a single .md file in the plans pipeline — either docs/plans/ (draft), docs/plans/in-progress/ (executing), or docs/plans/complete/ (done). (2) Plans actively being worked on should be in docs/plans/in-progress/, not still in the draft root. (3) Plans that are finished should be in docs/plans/complete/. If any plan appears to be in the wrong pipeline stage, block the stop and remind the agent to move it. Otherwise approve.
